source_pr.title: disttask: update error to subtasks properly
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #44440

Problem Summary:

Previously, the error reported in `InitSubtaskExecEnv` is not handled. The scheduler keeps running the "pending" subtasks and it finally causes the dead loop.

### What is changed and how it works?

- When `scheduler.Run` reports an error, we update it to one of the subtask.
- Fix the rollback logic to prevent removing `reorgCtx` twice. Otherwise it may panic in the goroutine spawned by `executeDistGlobalTask`.
- Load the whole global task in `probeTask` to make it updated as possible.
- Refine the interface method `UpdateGlobalTaskAndAddSubTasks`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note

```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature recorded in the case data; PR updates disttask error propagation and the captured signal is only BUILD race-mode metadata.
failure_signature: No concrete flaky signature recorded; disttask error propagation change with only BUILD race-mode metadata captured.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR updates disttask error propagation to subtasks. The case data only captures BUILD race-mode metadata and does not include a concrete flaky signature or a targeted stabilization change, so keep it as insufficient evidence rather than asserting a confirmed data race root cause.
fix_pattern: Update disttask error propagation; no clearly evidenced anti-flake stabilization in the case.

evidence: files: ddl/scheduler.go, disttask/framework/BUILD.bazel, disttask/framework/dispatcher/dispatcher.go, disttask/framework/framework_test.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/interface.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/interface_mock.go, disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler.go, disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go, store/copr/batch_coprocessor.go, store/copr/coprocessor.go
